name: auto-tinker
description: Local-first, chat-operated developer experiments, learning history, and approval-gated GitHub publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Turn curiosity into verified developer experiments.
interface.longDescription: Auto-Tinker helps a chat agent remember evidence-backed work, discover relevant ideas, manage a human-controlled queue, run bounded local experiments, teach the result, and publish only under explicit privacy policy.
defaultPrompt: Set up my local Auto-Tinker workspace.
Find and rank my best next experiment.
Review what I built and learned this week.
